preset_message_count.hint: Number of preset messages at the start of the conversation (0 = no preset, 2 = one user+assistant pair, etc.). These messages are always stable and will be preserved in pulse.

interval_seconds.hint: Seconds after last LLM response before sending a pulse (Anthropic cache TTL is 300s)

max_tries.description: 最大连续 Pulse 次数
max_tries.hint: Max consecutive pulses without a real user message before stopping

check_interval_seconds.hint: How often (seconds) the background loop checks sessions

debug_log.hint: Log cache pulse details to AstrBot log

notify_on_expire.description: 缓存即将过期时发送提醒
notify_on_expire.hint: Send a message when max pulse tries are exhausted and the cache is about to expire
